description: Complete system overview detailing the human services compliance and documentation platform architecture, core components, and high-level interactions
Detailed documentation of the risk analysis and prioritization algorithms, including risk categorization systems, severity classifications, and prioritization logic
Comprehensive documentation of the compliance validation system, including required documentation elements, validation rules, and internal consistency checks
Documentation of the document processing pipeline, including professional standards enforcement, text transformation rules, and audience-specific content adaptation
Detailed documentation of the case management data model, timeline tracking system, event categorization, and task management workflows
